texto: Stop telling me that love is blind. Love doesn't need to be blind
autor: it is accepting. It can see everything and still be unconditionally strong. Love sees you and accepts you for who you are.
explicacao: Citação de it is accepting. It can see everything and still be unconditionally strong. Love sees you and accepts you for who you are. sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Stop telling me that love is blind. Love doesn't need to be blind” articula reflexao, steve-maraboli, blind em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
